statements.sql: select * from "notifications" where "notifications"."notifiable_type" = 'App\Models\AdminUser' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" = '01KBAZZ18W0VWD47744CK4B1MD' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" is not null and json_extract("data", '$."format"') = 'filament' order by "created_at" desc limit 51 offset 0

select count(*) as aggregate from "notifications" where "notifications"."notifiable_type" = 'App\Models\AdminUser' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" = '01KBAZZ18W0VWD47744CK4B1MD' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" is not null and json_extract("data", '$."format"') = 'filament' and "read_at" is null
